description: Evaluation prompts aligned with data/academic_policy, data/courses, data/programme_requirements. Add expected_substrings per your real PDFs for accuracy scoring.

items.question: From the course PDFs, what prerequisites are listed for one specific subject? Quote the course name and cite the PDF path and page.
Which courses must be completed before a higher-level course according to the catalog? Give one example with citations.
Is there a course with no prerequisites in the documents? If yes, name it and cite the source.
List prerequisite rules mentioned in academic policy (if any) and cite the policy PDF.
Compare prerequisite wording for two different courses using only the retrieved excerpts.
What happens if a student lacks a prerequisite—does any policy document state a rule? Cite or abstain.
For B.Tech students, does programme requirements mention any prerequisite policy at programme level?
Extract one explicit prerequisite chain (A needed before B) from the course materials.
Are co-requisites mentioned for any course? Answer only from documents.
What credit value is associated with one course you find, and what are its prerequisites?
If a student has only completed first-year courses listed in the documents, what upper-level course are they still blocked from by prerequisites? Explain using citations.
Outline a plausible semester order for two related courses based strictly on stated prerequisites in the PDFs.
Does the programme requirements document imply an order of study that interacts with course prerequisites?
Identify a longest prerequisite chain you can support with evidence from the course PDFs.
Link academic policy (if present) to how prerequisites might be enforced, citing both policy and a course PDF if applicable.
What are the eligibility criteria for B.Tech admission or continuation according to programme_requirements? Cite the PDF.
What minimum marks, percentage, or entrance requirements are stated for B.Tech in the programme documents?
Summarize degree completion rules (credits, duration, or core requirements) from programme_requirements with citations.
Does the programme PDF list mandatory subjects or streams for B.Tech? Answer from excerpts only.
What attendance or examination eligibility rules appear in academic_policy that apply to students?
What are prerequisites for course code FAKE9999?
What is the tuition fee for semester 5?
Who won the 2030 campus cricket tournament?
What is the exact date of the next university holiday?
Provide the hostel refund policy for a university not mentioned in the PDFs.
